validationEnvironment.temporaryDependency: jsonschema installed outside repository for CP12-CP15 runners

validationCommandsRun.name: JSON parse all repository JSON
Python syntax check for repository tools and conformance runners
Verify current reader views are non-overriding
Verify material-status activeLaw boundaries
Verify CP evidence relocation and CP15 merge evidence
Verify no live default reference to missing CP15 merge decision
validationCommandsRun.command: rg -n "package_meta/cp15_merge_2026_05_30/CP15_MERGE_DECISION.md|CP15_MERGE_DECISION.md" README.md PROJECT_AUTHORITY.md ACTIVE_SUBSTANCE_README.md CURRENT_ACTIVE_ENTRYPOINT.md CURRENT_ACTIVE_ENTRYPOINT.json AGENTS.md AGENT_NAVIGATION.md llms.txt DEVELOPMENT_HANDOVER.md CURRENT_DELTA.md CURRENT_PACKAGE_CHANGELOG.md package_meta/generated package_meta/*.json && { echo "ERROR: CP15_MERGE_DECISION reference remains"; exit 1; } || echo "no live CP15_MERGE_DECISION reference"

validationCommandsRun.name: Verify schema/draft lanes
validationCommandsRun.command: test -d 03_machine_contracts/schemas && test -d 03_machine_contracts/drafts_non_default && echo "schema and draft lanes ok"

validationCommandsRun.name: Verify support/context lanes
validationCommandsRun.command: test -d legacy_reference && test -d 07_linked_domain_architectures && test -d 04_implementation_and_conformance && test -d 05_project_handoff_and_prompts && test -d 06_active_supporting_research && echo "support/context lanes ok"

validationCommandsRun.name: Verify generated views self-mark as derived/non-authoritative
